title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NHB

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NHB
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
